subcodes.title: Baz Av-u-Bidih Jamih
subcodes.first_line: Return and offer a cup to this thirsty cupbearer; From that eternal chalice, bestow upon this transient being;This temple [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باز آو بده جامی این ساقی عطشانرا زآن ساغر باقی ده این فانی دورانرا این هیکل
subcodes.subjects: @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @mystical themes, @pain of love; love as veil, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love as fire, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual transformation
